rulings.Case Title: PAUL R BARNES VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiffs To Further Respond To Requests For Admission, Special Interrogatories And Form Interrogatories And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Monday, September 28, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. DEFENDANT NOVELIS CORPORATION's Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiffs To Further Respond To Requests For Admission, Special Interrogatories And Form Interrogatories And For Sanctions is continued to October 5, 2010 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220 per agreement of parties. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: TIMOTHY CLARK VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Defendant York International Corporation Taking Of Deposition And Request For Production Of Documents
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Monday, September 28, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiff¿s motion to compel defendant York International Corporation¿s taking of deposition and request for production of documents is granted. The scope of the deposition is limited to the sites identified by plaintiff where he worked with defendant¿s products. Judge: Harold Kahn, Matter not reported = (220/HEK)
